title: Denshinbashira no Okaa-san
synopsis: It would be hard for anyone to imagine the combination of a mother and a telegraph pole. How could such a thing be possible? The image of the telegraph pole raising her child using cables in place of arms and legs is quite charming. The spirit of the producer who made such a wild idea into a film is also quite charming. (Source: AniDB)

title: 1st Kiss
titleRomaji: Ni De Rensheng Shi Wo Lai Chi Le
synonyms: I Don't Want To Treat You As Sister Anymore
I Don’t Want To Consider You As Sister Anymore
synopsis: Eight years ago, the mother of the young male lead Gu Chi and the father of the female lead Jiang Lan died in a car accident. Jiang Lan couldn't bear it when she saw that Gu Chi was in the same boat, so she adopted him. Nowadays, the relationship between Gu Chi, a rookie model, and supermodel Jiang Lan has undergone further changes in the workplace... (Source: Bilibili)

title: Jeremy no Ki
synopsis: Based on a children's picture book of the same name. A Christmas tale about a bird who was raised by tree after it was abandoned. The tree was then cut down for people in the city to use for Christmas celebrations. The bird desperately is trying to find its adoptive tree mother with the help of Jeremy, a penniless orphan, who heard her story so they go and search every tree being used in town. The search in the cold takes a toll on Jeremy until Santa Claus appears, but is it really him?

title: Yukiguni no Ouji-sama
synopsis: Koichi and his sister Yuki befriend Hanaguro, a swan who has flown to Japan from Siberia. Hanaguro is attacked by a dog, and the cowardly Koichi flees, but that night he has a dream in which he is whisked away to the Kingdom of Snow Prince, where he finds the bravery to help the other swans. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia)

title: Kizuna
synopsis: A Norton (anti-virus company) commissioned anime from Tekken showing a man who tries to protect his coworkers but caves under the social pressure. He finds himself scared and alone only for a girl to come and protect him (emotionally) and together they protect each other.

title: A Biblical Fantasy: Adam and Eve
titleEnglish: A Biblical Fantasy: Adam and Eve
titleNative: 聖書幻想譜 アダムとイブ

synopsis: An adaptation of the story of Adam and Eve; this is Oofuji's first film produced in full colour and a precursor to Kujira (1952) and Yuurei-sen (1956) stylistically.

tags.name: Religion
tags.description: Centers on the belief that humanity is related to supernatural, transcendental, and spiritual elements.

title: Palette: Shikisai no Shoujo
synopsis: Animated graduation work by Hirota Hirata. There was no "color" in the boy's world. One day the boy finds an old palette in a closet. When the palette opened, a little girl with colored eyes appeared from inside. The things she touched were magically colored one after another, and the boy, fascinated by the "colors" reflected in the black and white world, ran after the girl. "Show me the color, you just have to do it again." (Source: Video description, translated)

title: Futari no Ouji-sama
synopsis: On the island of Jambe, an introverted boy named Subarna is given a magic crown, with whose help he soon becomes the people's hero, known for his kindheartedness. This enrages Rupia, the island's young prince, who has Subarna arrested.

title: Chong Qi Chengyin: Lu Shao de Xinjian Chong
titleRomaji: Chong Qi Chengyin: Lu Shao de Xinjian Chong
titleNative: 宠妻成瘾：陆少的心尖宠
synopsis: Her vicious stepmother and manipulative sister never give her a moment's peace. After saving her from a desperate situation, the most powerful man in the city nicknamed The Living Devil falls for her and is determined to marry her. His name alone is enough to make her family and her scumbag ex-boyfriend fidget. Meanwhile, her love with the hero is growing deeper. (Source: MoboReader Youtube Channel)

title: The Dearest
synopsis: In-hye and Sun-mi visit their hometown, a small and quiet village in the countryside, after a long time only to face unexpected news: their old friend Eun-sil died while giving birth. The town is left in an uproar because of the baby, whose father is unknown, and it is neglected, protected by no one. While In-hye and Sun-mi try to save the baby with the help of Ji-young, their friend who has stayed in town, they find out that Eun-sil, who was mentally handicapped, was a plaything of the village. In-hye and Sun-mi are troubled with the rage they feel against the village people and the guilty conscience they feel towards Eun-sil. Although they abandoned Eun-sil in the past, will they be able to protect her baby until the end? (Source: HanCinema)
